problem id: 888069cb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND SHR(1)

examples:
  01111011 -> 00011100
  00111101 -> 00001110
  00100110 -> 00000001
  10000011 -> 01000000
  10110000 -> 00001000
  10111010 -> 00001100
  00010111 -> 00000001
  11010001 -> 01100000

query: 01001101
predicted answer: 00000010
